titleStmt.title: SII 37.372: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 372. (A.R. No. B 1 of 1941-42.) Mācherla, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District.

summary.p: Broken slab found near the well about 2 miles from Mācherla on the way to Kambhaṁpāḍu.
Eastern Chāḷukya: Sakala-lōkāśraya Jayasimha Vallabha II 8th Regnal year (709 A.D.)

Slightly damaged. It registers a grant of six puṭṭis of land made by Kalyāṇavasantulu, the son of Dhanyavasantha-Pṛithvī Dēśaraṭṭaguḍi, who was the son of Dayāvasanta-Pṛithvī-Dēśaraṭṭaguḍi, to Arahanta Bhaṭāra. The gift was to be maintained by the family of Raṭṭaguḍis of Koṁthūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī sakalalōkāśraya
śrī jayasiṁgha vallabha mahā
rājulāku pravaddhamāna vi
jayarājya saṁvvatsaraṁbu
ḷḷeṇbādi Annēṇbanpaḷli nāṇṭi
dayā vasanta
prithivī dēśaraṭṭa guḍla
muṭḷa dhanya vasanta prithivīdēśa
raṭṭaguḍḷu vārimuṭḷu kalyāṇa va
sastula Icciri Arahanta bhaṭā
raḷāku Ārupuṭlu
Āthapaṭṭu sukṣētraṁbu [.]
dēninkoṁthūri raṭṭaguḷla Anva
yaṁbuna vārevvaraiyumu rakṣimpanuṁna
paṁnnuvḷāyuṁ [.] dēniki Ahitaṁbu cintiñcu
vāru pañcamahāpātaka saṁyuttu
lagudur ravibhadrācā¨ryyasya śiṣya
dēvacandrācāyyasya śiṣyamā
ṟātbhōḷāśiṣya mañca
celi dēnivraccinavāru ceḍunu
kāḷā
Digital edition of SII 37.372 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
